'''pafana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oocyte|oocyte]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oocyte|oocyte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pafana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæfænæth|pæfænæth]] || [[word:pæfænæj|pæfænæj]] || [[word:pæfænæsh|pæfænæsh]] || [[word:pæfænæ|pæfænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pafafanath|pafafanath]] || [[word:pafafanaj|pafafanaj]] || [[word:pafafanash|pafafanash]] || [[word:pafafana|pafafana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pafanath|pafanath]] || [[word:pafanaj|pafanaj]] || [[word:pafanash|pafanash]] || [[word:pafana|pafana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pafafnath|pafafnath]] || [[word:pafafnaj|pafafnaj]] || [[word:pafafnash|pafafnash]] || [[word:pafafnaf|pafafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pafanatha|pafanatha]] || [[word:pafanaja|pafanaja]] || [[word:pafanasha|pafanasha]] || [[word:pafanaka|pafanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pafanath|pafanath]] || [[word:pafanaj|pafanaj]] || [[word:pafanash|pafanash]] || [[word:pafana|pafana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pafanathal|pafanathal]] || [[word:pafanajal|pafanajal]] || [[word:pafanashal|pafanashal]] || [[word:pafanakal|pafanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pafanathatha|pafanathatha]] || [[word:pafanajaja|pafanajaja]] || [[word:pafanashasha|pafanashasha]] || [[word:pafanaka|pafanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pafanathan|pafanathan]] || [[word:pafanajan|pafanajan]] || [[word:pafanashan|pafanashan]] || [[word:pafanakan|pafanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pafanathaoro|pafanathaoro]] || [[word:pafanajaoro|pafanajaoro]] || [[word:pafanashaoro|pafanashaoro]] || [[word:pafanakaoro|pafanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
